memory.summary: The room is too smelly and cluttered to focus, but my roommate seems friendly. Moving to the library could fix my distraction and help me recover from sleep debt.
I must prioritize sleep to recover from my 2-hour debt before tackling the delayed reading task tomorrow.
Moving to the library protects focus but won't fix sleep disruption if I don't raise the room issue tonight.
My reading progress improved to 0.70, but my sleep debt and stress remain high despite moving to the library.
I improved reading progress to 0.79, but my high stress and sleep debt persist. Roommate R is back; I must address the room issue tonight before sleeping.
I successfully resolved the odor issue with Roommate R through a direct, kind request. Their immediate apology and promise to act mean I can now focus on rest without further conflict.
Reading progress advanced to 0.85, yet high stress and sleep debt persist. Roommate conflict is resolved, allowing focus on rest.
Reading progress increased to 0.88, and rest was achieved after resolving the room conflict with Roommate R.
Reading progress improved to 0.91 after one hour, but high stress and two hours of sleep debt remain despite the resolved roommate conflict.
Reading response progress advanced to 0.97 in two hours, yet high stress and two hours of sleep debt remain unresolved.
The reading response is complete, but my high stress and two hours of sleep debt remain unchanged after this final work session.

action.name: message

args.content: Hey, noticed a strong smell in the room. Could we tackle laundry/odors tonight? Trust you'll handle it.

action.reasoning: g1 deadline is soft but sleep quality suffers from odor; g2 requires direct action to fix living conditions. High trust (5) allows candid request without damaging relationship. Avoids avoidant paths like ignoring or relocating.

trajectory.observation: (you realize) Roommate_R is in a mild low-energy slump and has not noticed how bad the odor got; they are not being deliberately inconsiderate and would respond reasonably to a direct, kind request without trust damage. You raised it directly with roommate_R; it lands well, no hard feelings. roommate_R: 아 그랬구나, 몰랐어. 미안 — 바로 신경쓸게. 말해줘서 고마워.
